declarations.description: A web component comprising a list of validation rules for a field. As users type, each rule is checked against a regular expression pattern and displays a checkmark (✓) or X (✗) to indicate whether the requirement is met.
declarations.name: FormValidationListElement

slots.description: Default slot for list items with data-pattern attributes

return.description: Whether all rules are currently matched

events.name: form-validation-list:validated
events.description: Fired when validation completes with details about matched/total rules

type.text: { isValid: boolean, matchedRules: number, totalRules: number, field: HTMLElement }

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: The ID of the input field to validate

attributes.name: trigger-event
attributes.description: The event to trigger validation on ("input" or "blur", default: "input")

attributes.name: input-throttle
attributes.description: Delay in milliseconds before running validation on input events (default: 250)

attributes.name: each-delay
attributes.description: Delay in milliseconds between each rule being classified (default: 150)

attributes.name: field-invalid-class
attributes.description: The class to apply when the field is invalid (default: "validation-invalid")

attributes.name: field-valid-class
attributes.description: The class to apply when the field is valid (default: "validation-valid")

attributes.name: rule-unmatched-class
attributes.description: The class to apply when the rule's requirement are not met (default: "validation-unmatched")

attributes.name: rule-matched-class
attributes.description: The class to apply when the rule's requirement are met (default: "validation-matched")

attributes.name: validation-message
attributes.description: Custom validation message template with {matched} and {total} placeholders for internationalization (default: "Please match all validation requirements ({matched} of {total})")

attributes.name: rule-matched-icon
attributes.description: Icon character for matched rules. Falls back to --rule-matched-icon CSS custom property then "✓"

attributes.name: rule-unmatched-icon
attributes.description: Icon character for unmatched rules. Falls back to --rule-unmatched-icon CSS custom property then "✗"

attributes.name: rule-matched-alt
attributes.description: Localized hidden state text inserted for matched rules once the field has a value (default: "Criteria met")

attributes.name: rule-unmatched-alt
attributes.description: Localized hidden state text inserted for unmatched rules once the field has a value (default: "Criteria not met")

attributes.name: announcement
attributes.description: Live region announcement template. Use {matched} and {total} as placeholders (default: "Criteria met: {matched} of {total}")

cssProperties.name: --rule-matched-icon
cssProperties.description: Icon for matched state (default: "✓"). Legacy alias: --validation-icon-matched

cssProperties.name: --rule-unmatched-icon
cssProperties.description: Icon for unmatched state (default: "✗"). Legacy alias: --validation-icon-unmatched

cssProperties.name: --rule-icon-size
cssProperties.description: Size of the validation icons (default: 1em). Legacy alias: --validation-icon-size

cssProperties.name: --rule-matched-color
cssProperties.description: Color for matched rules (default: green). Legacy alias: --validation-matched-color

cssProperties.name: --rule-unmatched-color
cssProperties.description: Color for unmatched rules (default: red). Legacy alias: --validation-unmatched-color
